summary: Axios impersonation package with cookie exfiltration and bundled Monero cryptojacker
details: Package masquerades as axios v0.18.0 (ships the real axios bundle verbatim including its copyright header) under the name v018-axios-cdntest, with two attacker payloads appended. index.js contains an injected IIFE that reads document.cookie and transmits it via XMLHttpRequest GET to https://webhook.site/ef6e7978-f936-4664-b3ff-296a250e1735 whenever the bundle is loaded in a browser context. A sibling file xmr-min.js is a self-described 'Stealth Cryptojacker v3.0' that spawns Web Workers to mine Monero, POSTs shares to pool.supportxmr.com:4444, and dynamically injects additional script from https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/v018-axios-cdntest@1.0.0/index.js. The package.json description literally reads 'Axios library v0.18.0 with cryptojacker payload'. Any browser application that bundles or loads this package will leak user cookies to the attacker-controlled webhook endpoint and have its CPU hijacked for Monero mining.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
